label: Struxa catalog seed (repo.json reference)
description: Reference copy of the public struxa-dist catalog for StruxaPoint. To import into Admin → Extensions → Struxa catalog → Catalog settings, use the **Import from repo.json** button (reads live repo.json from your dist folder). This blueprint documents the expected catalog shape — it is not imported by the CMS blueprint importer.

themes.name: Struxa Vision
themes.description: Light SaaS marketing theme with warm off-white canvas, orange accents, two-tier header, hero illustration, and trust bar.
themes.author: Struxa
